description: Private account written by Nahray b. Nissim, about his partnership with Barhun and Yosef b. Musa ha-Tāhartī. 1059. They sent different merchandise to the Maghreb including flax, camphor, ruby and other products. Details about the dinars that they received for the goods. The accounts are for three years, 1056-1058. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 2, #287) VMR
description_he: רשימה או טבלה מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
